body_txt: Works of Art that use traditional paint mediums. This applies to mediums like oil, acrylic, gouache, ink, and watercolors, and paintings done on canvas and plaster (in which case, they are frescoes). For the individuals that made the works of art, see Painters . Do not confuse with the trope Tableau , which is when motion-picture works have their characters stand still for a while, as if they were the subjects of a painting.
